basic_details.job_title: NCSM Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Technician, Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) has officially announced the Senior Technician (Carpentry) and Technician (Carpentry/Fitter) Recruitment 2026 with 8 vacancies. The detailed notification was published at ncsm.gov.in. Candidates who meet the required criteria such as SSC/Matriculation with ITI certificate or equivalent along with relevant experience and fall within the applicable age limits are eligible to attend the walk-in selection process. The recruitment will be conducted through walk-in interviews scheduled on 30-06-2026 for Senior Technician and 10-07-2026 for Technician posts,

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: SSC or Matriculation with ITI certificate or equivalent. Experience required as per post.
qualification.details: Senior Technician (Carpenter): SSC or Matriculation with a certificate from ITI or equivalent discipline. Must be retired Technicians in the trade of Carpentry from Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Body in the grade of F or G in the Pay Matrix Level-7 or 9. Technician (Carpenter/Fitter): SSC or Matriculation with a certificate from ITI or equivalent discipline. Candidates must have one year of experience after obtaining the certificate for a course duration of two years. For candidates obtaining certificates of one-year course duration, two years of relevant experience after obtaining the certificate shall be required.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Walk-in Written Test & Trade Test Document Verification

rows.national_council_of_science_museums_ncsm: SSC or Matriculation with ITI certificate or equivalent. Experience required as per post.

content_sections.heading: NCSM Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NCSM Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NCSM Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Technician (Carpenter): SSC or Matriculation with a certificate from ITI or equivalent discipline. Must be retired Technicians in the trade of Carpentry from Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Body in the grade of F or G in the Pay Matrix Level-7 or 9. Technician (Carpenter/Fitter): SSC or Matriculation with a certificate from ITI or equivalent discipline. Candidates must have one year of experience after obtaining the certificate for a course duration of two years. For candidates obtaining certificates of one-year course duration, two years of relevant experience after obtaining the certificate shall be required.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

rows.event: Walk-in Written Test & Trade Test for Technician (Carpentry/Fitter)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Walk-in Written Test & Trade Test Document Verification

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NCSM Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NCSM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify a last date for application. Interested candidates should refer to the official notification for precise dates and deadlines.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for these NCSM posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is Walk-in. Candidates are required to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies announced by NCSM?
faq.answer: NCSM has announced a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Senior Technician (Carpentry) and Technician (Carpentry/Fitter).

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Technician posts?
faq.answer: For Technician posts, candidates need to have SSC or Matriculation with a certificate from ITI or an equivalent discipline, along with relevant experience as specified.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NCSM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Technician post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Technician (Carpenter) post is Rs.45,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for Senior Technician (Carpentry)?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Senior Technician (Carpentry) is scheduled for 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these NCSM jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview, Walk-in Written Test & Trade Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Kolkata, West Bengal, at the address: National Council of Science Museums, Kolkata, West Bengal - 700091.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the NCSM recruitment?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations. Candidates should consult the official notification for detailed information.
